Uses of Package
neqsim.process.costestimation

Packages that use neqsim.process.costestimation
Package
Description
neqsim.process.costestimation
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.absorber
Cost estimation classes for absorbers.
neqsim.process.costestimation.adsorber
Cost estimation classes for adsorber/mercury removal equipment.
neqsim.process.costestimation.column
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.compressor
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.ejector
Cost estimation classes for ejectors.
neqsim.process.costestimation.electrolyzer
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.expander
Cost estimation classes for turboexpanders.
neqsim.process.costestimation.filter
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.heatexchanger
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.manifold
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.mixer
Cost estimation classes for mixers.
neqsim.process.costestimation.pipe
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.pump
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.reactor
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.separator
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.splitter
Cost estimation classes for splitters.
neqsim.process.costestimation.tank
Cost estimation classes for storage tanks.
neqsim.process.costestimation.topsides
Topsides facility cost-estimation utilities.
neqsim.process.costestimation.valve
 
neqsim.process.costestimation.well
 
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.subsea
Subsea production system modeling for field development workflow.
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign
 
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.subsea
Mechanical design package for subsea SURF (Subsea, Umbilicals, Risers, Flowlines) equipment.
neqsim.process.processmodel
 
neqsim.process.util.fielddevelopment
Field Development Planning utilities for NeqSim.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.costestimation used by neqsim.process.costestimation
    Class
    Description
    CostEstimateBasis
    Source and quality basis for a NeqSim cost estimate.
    CostEstimateResult
    Detailed, report-ready cost estimate result for one unit or a whole process.
    CostEstimationCalculator
    Cost estimation calculator for process equipment.
    EstimateClass
    AACE-style estimate classes for NeqSim cost estimates.
    MaterialTakeOffItem
    A material take-off line item used in detailed NeqSim cost estimates.
    ProcessCostEstimate.EquipmentCostSummary
    Summary of cost data for a single equipment item.
    UnitCostEstimateBaseClass
    Base class for equipment cost estimation.
